Description.en: Added Effects that apply to your weapon, such as Finishers. Finishers add effects when you kill a Monster of a specific Rarity. You can only have 1 Finisher per Rarity type equipped at a time.
Description.zh: 适用于武器的附加效果，例如终结特效。终结特效会在你击杀特定稀有度的怪物时触发效果。每种稀有度等级你只能同时装备一种击败特效。

Description.en: Adds a Frame to your character portrait. This can be seen in the Social Panel, Party UI, and on the character select menu.
Description.zh: 为你的角色头像添加边框。该边框可在社交面板、队伍界面以及角色选择菜单中看到。

Description.en: Changes the appearance of your Endurance, Frenzy and Power Charges.
Description.zh: 改变你的耐力球、狂怒球和暴击球的外观。

Description.en: Extra Effects are special effects that do not apply to specific mtx slot and are triggered on certain conditions, such as opening a chest.
Description.zh: 额外特效是指不应用于特定外观槽位、而是在特定条件下（例如开启宝箱时）触发的特殊效果。

Description.en: Effects that add tattoos or scars to your characters skin, or replace their skin entirely.
Description.zh: 为角色添加纹身或伤疤，或完全替换角色外观。

Description.en: Tracking Scrolls keep record of specific statistics such as monster kills or number of items picked up. You can pin a specific scroll to your profile to display to your friends, party or guild members, and can also be linked in chat.
Description.zh: 追踪卷轴用于记录特定统计数据，例如击杀怪物数量或拾取物品数量。你可以将某个卷轴固定在个人资料上，向好友、队伍或公会成员展示，也可以在聊天中发送链接。

Description.en: Effects that play when your character levels up. You can only have 1 Level Up Effect equipped at a time.
Description.zh: 在你的角色升级时播放的特效。你每次只能装备一个升级特效。

Description.en: Adds an effect when your dodge roll and sprint.
Description.zh: 闪避翻滚和奔跑时添加特效。

Description.en: Changes the appearance of your character when shapeshifted into a Bear.
Description.zh: 变形为巨熊时，改变你的角色外观。

Description.en: Changes the appearance of your character when shapeshifted into a Wolf.
Description.zh: 变形为巨狼时，改变你的角色外观。

Description.en: Changes the appearance of your character when shapeshifted into a Demon.
Description.zh: 变形为恶魔时，改变你的角色外观。

Description.en: Changes the appearance of your character when shapeshifted into a Wyvern.
Description.zh: 变形为双足飞龙时，改变你的角色外观。
